prompt_text:
### Demographics: 58-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.9 kg; Height 152.7 cm; BMI 26.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 137/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 210mg/dL; 9 months ago 238mg/dL; 6 months ago 238mg/dL; 3 months ago 221mg/dL; current 169mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.3kg; 9 months ago 60.9kg; 6 months ago 59.2kg; 3 months ago 54.9kg; current 60.9kg), Height (12 months ago 152.7cm; 9 months ago 152.7cm; 6 months ago 152.7cm; 3 months ago 152.7cm; current 152.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 26.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 138mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 137mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 78mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; current 78mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 12mg/g; 9 months ago 11mg/g; 6 months ago 9.0mg/g; 3 months ago 11mg/g; current 11mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 101mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 141mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.9g/dL; current 13.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
